hero.headline: One Platform. Four Stakeholders. One Ecosystem.
hero.subheadline: JAR transforms residential community management from scattered chaos to one intelligent, connected system — from handover day to maximum resident satisfaction.

problem.title: Your Smart Community Managed the Old Way?
problem.subtitle: New building, elegant lobby, premium finishes — but behind the scenes:
problem.p1_desc: No documentation, no tracking, no real accountability.
problem.p2_desc: You discover problems after they happen — and after they escalate.
problem.p3_desc: No unified financial visibility, no real-time data.
problem.p4_desc: Random complaints with no way to track or close them.

whofor.title: Who Is JAR For?
whofor.subtitle: One system that serves every stakeholder exactly what they need
whofor.dev_desc: From the moment you hand over your project, control its reputation and performance. Unified dashboard across all your projects, full visibility on resident satisfaction, and real-time operational reports.
whofor.hoa_desc: Manage maintenance requests, payments, service providers, and resident communication — everything in one organized, easy system without juggling multiple tools.

about.title: A Saudi Platform Connecting Every Stakeholder in Your Community
about.body: At JAR, we believe every residential community deserves a system that makes life better — for residents and those who manage them. Vision 2030 is accelerating the shift toward homeownership, and JAR was born from exactly that gap.
about.stat1_label: of Saudis own their homes today
about.stat3_label: Vision accelerating the shift to homeownership
about.point3: Reports and insights at your fingertips

solutions.title: What Does JAR Offer?
solutions.subtitle: Six integrated solutions covering every aspect of residential community management
solutions.card1_desc: All unit and resident details in one place — organized and easy
solutions.card2_desc: Receive and assign maintenance requests to providers instantly
solutions.card3_desc: An app connecting residents to all their needs from home
solutions.card4_desc: Manage fees and payments with full transparency and live reports
solutions.card5_desc: Real data to help you make better decisions for your community
solutions.card6_desc: All stakeholders in one system — no chaos, no fragmentation

diff.title: What Makes Us Different
diff.subtitle: Three pillars that set JAR apart from any other solution in the market
diff.d1_desc: No competitor targets developers during the mandatory two-year post-handover period. JAR enters at the most critical point in the property lifecycle and builds dependency before anyone else.
diff.d2_desc: No payments lost in the air, no financial disputes. JAR integrates secure escrow payments as a structural element that raises trust between developer, resident, and service provider.
diff.d3_desc: Predictive maintenance, intelligent matching between requests and service providers, and proactive recommendations to reduce operational costs and extend the life of your assets.

how.title: How Does JAR Work?
how.subtitle: Four steps that transform your community
how.s1_desc: Enter building and unit data in minutes. No paperwork, no waiting.
how.s2_desc: Automatic invitations and quick setup — everyone inside the system within hours.
how.s3_desc: Requests route automatically, approvals are documented, payments are secure.
how.s4_desc: Smart reports, proactive alerts, and resident satisfaction on your screen.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Is there a free trial period?
faq.a1: Yes, we offer a complete trial session with our team including a live demo before any commitment. Contact us to schedule a convenient time.
faq.q2: Is pricing negotiable for large portfolios?
faq.a2: Yes. For developers with large portfolios or associations with large unit counts, we offer special pricing.
faq.q3: What is the subscription contract like?
faq.a3: Annual subscription with renewal option. No long-term mandatory contracts at this stage — we trust the platform's value is what keeps you.
faq.q4: Are there any upfront setup fees?
faq.a4: No. The JAR team handles complete platform setup and team training as part of the annual subscription — no additional fees.
faq.q5: What level of technical support is provided?
faq.a5: Technical support available via WhatsApp and email during business hours. For developers with large portfolios, we provide a dedicated account manager for direct contact.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Fill out the form and we'll get back to you soon.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: The intelligent operating system for Saudi residential communities
